title: Mob Swords
description: This Datapack adds 20 New Mob Based Swords to the game
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b9BIdrLlxLs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**EACH MOB SWORD CAN ONLY BE CRAFTED ONCE _(If more than one of the same mob sword is used at the same time, issues may orrur)_**

**Each sword has 2 different unique abilities, each ability is based off the mob,**
**the more expensive the recipe, the more powerful the sword, all mob swords are equivalent to a Sharpness V diamond sword (every mob sword is unenchantable).**

**All Mob Sword recipes should show up in the recipe book _(if not, run the command: /reload)_**

**Commands:**

**_/trigger index:_** _opens a dialog with info about each mob sword and their abilities_

**_/trigger knockback:_** _Toggles kb 1 for all the mob swords for the current player_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Rt5oUv220uA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
